message:
viz: add 5 test suites (binning, SbS, playback E2E, mini-map)

- window.__runBinningTests(): ~50 assertions for wallClockBinKey,
  wallClockFloor, wallClockBinMinutes, buildWallClockBins,
  aggregateBinMetric (DST, empty bins, UTC/local, all resolutions)
- window.__runBinningE2ETests(): 7 scenarios (resolution toggle,
  timezone toggle, metric toggle, URL round-trip, defaults omission,
  empty bins in chart)
- window.__runSbsTests(): ~40 assertions for normalizeHeadingText,
  buildHeadingMatchMap (exact/fuzzy/duplicate/renamed/moved/tie-break)
- window.__runPlaybackE2ETests(): 9 scenarios (play/pause/toggle/stop,
  speed change, loop/no-loop, manual scrub, scrub while paused)
- window.__runMiniMapTests(): ~45 assertions for slugifyHeading,
  extractOutline, countRoughTokens, buildLineToHeadingMap,
  attributeHunksToHeadings

Closes: bd-24q.12.3, bd-24q.12.4, bd-24q.12, bd-24q.15.4,
        bd-24q.7.4, bd-24q.7, bd-24q.2.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
